title: Lesson 161: (Grammar) - number one; first; first place; best; most; game; ...

intro_cards.title: Superlative: 一番 (Most ~)
intro_cards.body:
一番 (いちばん) means 'the most' / 'number one' — forms superlatives.

Pattern: [topic]は + 一番 + [adjective/adverb]

• 富士山は日本で一番高い山です。
(Mt. Fuji is the tallest mountain in Japan.)
• 何が一番好きですか？(What do you like most?)
• 一番安いのはどれですか？(Which is the cheapest?)

一番 can also mean 'first' or 'best' as a noun:
• 一番になりたい。(I want to be number one.)

For comparatives (A more than B), use より or ほうが.
